protein_name: Catalyzes the decarboxylation of L-3,4-dihydroxyphenylalanine (DOPA) to dopamine, L-5-hydroxytryptophan to serotonin and L-tryptophan to tryptamine. Belongs to the group II decarboxylase family. 4 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
